examples:
Command Example
#
!cisco-stealthwatch-list-security-events-results tenant_id=102 limit=5 search_id=604f64e1e4b0bbedc8c77aa4
Context Example
#
{
"CiscoStealthwatch"
:

outputs.description: str The ID of the security event. CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.domainId
outputs.name: CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.id

outputs.description: The domain ID of the security event. CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.deviceId str
outputs.name: str

outputs.description: CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.securityEventType str The type of the security event.
outputs.name: The device ID of the security event.

outputs.description: str The first active time of the security event. CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.lastActiveTime
outputs.name: CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.firstActiveTime

outputs.description: The last active time of the security event. CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.source str
outputs.name: str

outputs.description: CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.target str The target of the security event.
outputs.name: The source of the security event.

outputs.description: str The details of the security event. CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.hitCount
outputs.name: CiscoStealthwatch.SecurityEventResults.details

outputs.description: The hit count of the security event.
outputs.name: str
